_instructions: Six curated projects. Each needs a technologies[] array (loader maps over it).

projects.title: Credit-Card Fraud Detection
projects.description: An end-to-end MLOps pipeline that trains, tracks, and serves a credit-card fraud classifier — from imbalanced-data handling and model evaluation to a containerized, reproducible deployment.

projects.title: Time-Series Forecasting
projects.description: Demand and financial time-series forecasting in Python — exploratory analysis, feature engineering, and backtested models comparing classical statistics against machine-learning approaches.

projects.title: Mutual-Fund Analysis Dashboard
projects.description: An interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing mutual-fund performance, risk, and returns — backed by a Python data-prep layer that cleans and aggregates fund data into decision-ready visuals.

projects.title: Supply-Chain Dashboard
projects.description: A supply-chain analytics dashboard surfacing inventory, fulfillment, and cost KPIs — turning raw operational data into clear signals for planning and bottleneck detection.

projects.title: HR Analytics KPI Dashboard
projects.description: A Power BI KPI dashboard for HR analytics — tracking headcount, attrition, and workforce trends with custom DAX measures and drill-through for stakeholder self-service.

projects.title: Call-Center Performance Analytics
projects.description: A performance-analytics dashboard for call-center operations — visualizing call volume, handle time, and CSAT so managers can monitor service levels and staffing at a glance.
